titleStmt.title: SII 18.67: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 67. (B.K. No. 169 of 1933-34.) HONAVĀḌ, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in front of the School.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva and is dated in Śaka 984, Sōbhkaṛit, Mārgaśira ba. Pāḍiva, Sunday. The week day is wrong. The given tithi which corresponds to A.D. 1062, November 20, fell on Wednesday. It is stated that on the tithi cited, a certain grant was made on account of the lunar eclipse. This eclipse occurred on the previous day, viz., November 19, Tuesday when Pratipadā commenced at ·51.

It registers a grant of land, an oil-mill and a garden for worship and offerings to god Siddhēs11varadēva. The gift was made by Kētaladēvi queen of Trailōkyamalladēva (Sōmēs11vara I) while residing at Kālyāṇa. She is stated to be administering the agarhāra town Ponnavāḍa (modern Honavāḍ) situated in the district of Bāge Fifty included in the division of Six-hundred situated in Tardavāḍi Thousand.

In continuation of this record is engraved in the same hand, another inscription belonging to the reign of Bhuvanaikamalla (Sōmēs11vara II) and dated in Śaka 995. Presumably the record of the time of Sōmēs11vara I also was put on stone on the latter date though the grant was actually made on the date mentioned in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrīkaṇṭha
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirā
ja paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ
baraṁ saluttamire sukhasaṁkhatāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyu
ttamire . tanmanōnayanavallabhe . svastyanavarataparama
kalyāṇābhyudayasahasraphaḷabhōgādidvitīyalakṣmī
śrīṁgārasarvvasvadhāriṇi sujanōpakāriṇi cāḷukyarāmama
nassarōvararājahaṁse sarasvatīkarṇnāvataṁse . karppūra
dhārāvarṣe yaṁtaḥpuramukhādarśe gōtrapavitre cā
rucaritre rūpavidyādhari vibhavapuraṁdari śrīmatraiḷōkya
malladēvaviśāḷavakṣasthaḷanivāsiniyarappa śrīmatkēta
ladēviyaru terdavāḍi sāsiradoḷagaṇaṟunūṟuṁbāḍada baḷi
ya kaṁpaṇaṁ bāgeyayvattaḻoḷagaṇuttemamagrahāraṁ po
nnavāḍamaṁ tribhōgābhyatarasiddhiyidāḷuttamire kalyāṇada nele
vīḍinoḷ sakavarṣa 984 neya śōbhakṛtsaṁvatsarada mārggaśira
bahuḷa pāḍivamādityavāraṁ sōmagrahaṇa nimittadiṁ siddhēśvaradē
vargge khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhāra dhūpadīpanivēdyakke sarvvanamasyavā
gi biṭṭa mattarippattaydu gāṇavondu tōṭa [1 .]
Digital edition of SII 18.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
